//: The Librarian Codex auto-capture hooks (spec 2026-06-16-harness-auto-capture, Phase 2A). MERGED into ~/.codex/hooks.json by the installer CLI (packages/installer-cli/src/harnesses/codex.ts), mirroring mem0's install_codex_hooks.py. The ${LIBRARIAN_CODEX_ROOT} placeholder is rewritten to the absolute install path of this integration; the 'the-librarian-codex' owner marker in each command string makes the merge idempotent (re-install strips owned entries first). Codex requires `codex_hooks = true` under [features] in ~/.codex/config.toml for these to fire. ASSUMED hook events + payload shape are derived from mem0's proven Codex wiring + the Claude payload (see scripts/lib/transcript.mjs); SC1 (true e2e against a running Codex) is DEFERRED — no codex CLI on the build machine to confirm.
